claims.summary: A 12D glimpse must remain an additive map over the live semantic lane rather than replace identity or continuity transport.
The glimpse carries named warmth, emotional, tail, residual, and shadow lineage with explicit fidelity and resonance-loss checks.
High- and low-entropy source states remain distinguishable in the 12D companion tests.
Sending 12D as live transport or changing protocol/ABI remains operator-gated despite the safe companion observer.
